response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in the core requirements of this role: large-scale C++ infrastructure, distributed systems, and cloud compute platforms. His background is more diverse than specialized, which may limit his immediate fit but could bring valuable perspective.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source and technical mentorship (e.g., workshops, GISCollective).
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with exposure to high-performance tools (e.g., DLang, Node.js).
Strong track record of driving projects from conception to deployment, including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ (only ~2 years at National Instruments) and large-scale distributed systems/cloud compute platforms.
Most roles emphasize full-stack or product development rather than infrastructure or technical leadership in cloud compute.
No explicit evidence of managing project priorities or deadlines in a technical leadership capacity for cloud/DevOps teams.
